zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg於大約1102年出生在瑞士爾利吉包格時，她的父親Adalbert II. von Mörsberg38歲，母親Mathilde de Mousson23歲。她於1124年與Meginhard von Sponheim結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1179年3月12日在德國爾特波格納雷海姆享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mörsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Johan, Lars, Alf, Nels, Nils, Bjoern, Bjorn, Elof, Evald, Klas, Nanna.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements fors ‘waterfall’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Fosberg and Fosburg .

variants.name: Fosberg
meanings: Norwegian: variant of Fossberg, a habitational name from a farm named Fossberg, from Old Norse fors ‘waterfall’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Fosburg
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Forsberg   and Norwegian   Fosberg  .

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mechtild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg was born about 1102, in Kyburg, Zürich, Switzerland, her father, Adalbert II. von Mörsberg, was 38 and her mother, Mathilde de Mousson, was 23. She married Meginhard von Sponheim in 1124. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 12 March 1179, in Neresheim, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg est née environ 1102, à Kyburg, Zurich, Suisse, son père, Adalbert II. von Mörsberg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Mousson, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Meginhard von Sponheim en 1124. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1179, à Neresheim, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg um 1102 in Kyburg, Zürich, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adalbert II. von Mörsberg 38 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Mousson 23. Sie hat 1124 Meginhard von Sponheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. März 1179 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Neresheim, Württemberg, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg(이)가 대략 1102년 스위스 즈u리치 키버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adalbert II. von Mörsberg(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Mousson(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1124년 Meginhard von Sponheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1179년 3월 12일 독일 wu르테버그 네레셰임에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Meginhard von Sponheim em 1124. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1179, em Neresheim, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg родилась около 1102 г. в местности кибург, зuрич, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Adalbert II. von Mörsberg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Mousson, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Meginhard von Sponheim в 1124 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 марта 1179 г. в местности нирешим, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 78 лет.

Se casó con Meginhard von Sponheim en 1124. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1179, en Neresheim, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 78 años.
